title: WFPropertyLossRunExtraction
description: Structured extraction schema for property loss run documents. Output is document-centric (no UUIDs). The persistence service resolves all x-db-key fields to foreign keys and upserts reference entities before inserting transactional rows.

reportMetadata.description: Metadata about the source document. Maps to: wf_property_lossrun_report.

source.description: Organization that issued the document (e.g., 'Marsh USA LLC', 'Lockton Companies', 'Sedgwick', 'FM Global'). Maps to: wf_property_lossrun_report.source_system AND used as natural key to resolve wf_property_lossrun_broker.

documentType.description: Classification of the document format. Maps to: wf_property_lossrun_report.document_type.

valuationDate.description: Date the loss run data was valued or current as of (e.g., 'Valued as of 9/25/2024'). Maps to: wf_property_lossrun_report.valuation_date.

reportDate.description: Date the document or letter was issued. Maps to: wf_property_lossrun_report.report_date.

lookbackPeriod.description: Coverage period reviewed in the report. Maps to: wf_property_lossrun_report.period_start / period_end.

broker.description: Broker or TPA that produced this document. Maps to: wf_property_lossrun_broker (upsert on name). Natural key: name.

name.description: Full legal name of the broker or TPA (e.g., 'Marsh USA LLC', 'Lockton Companies'). Maps to: wf_property_lossrun_broker.name.

contactName.description: Name of the individual signing or issuing the document. Maps to: wf_property_lossrun_broker.contact_name.

phone.description: Broker phone number. Maps to: wf_property_lossrun_broker.phone.

email.description: Broker email address. Maps to: wf_property_lossrun_broker.email.

licenseNumber.description: State insurance license number if present on the document (e.g., 'California Insurance License #0437153'). Maps to: wf_property_lossrun_broker.license_number.

address.description: Broker office address as printed on the document. Maps to: wf_property_lossrun_broker.address.

insured.description: Named insured entity. Maps to: wf_property_lossrun_insured (upsert on name). Natural key: name.

name.description: Legal name of the insured as printed on the document (e.g., 'Greystar Real Estate Partners', 'Advenir, Inc.'). Maps to: wf_property_lossrun_insured.name.

portfolioOwner.description: Parent investment manager or owning entity if different from named insured (e.g., 'MetLife Core Property Fund', 'Knightvest Holdings, LLC'). Maps to: wf_property_lossrun_insured.contact_name (overloaded) or future portfolio_owner column.

location.description: Physical insured location. Maps to: wf_property_lossrun_property (upsert on name + address.street). Natural key: name + address.street.

name.description: Property or asset name (e.g., 'Grapevine TwentyFour 99', 'Saxon Woods'). May be null on no-loss letters where the document only references the insured. Maps to: wf_property_lossrun_property.name.

propertyType.description: Occupancy or property type (e.g., 'Multifamily Apartment'). Maps to: wf_property_lossrun_property.property_type.

fmGlobal.description: FM Global-specific location identifiers. Present only on FM Global documents.

policies.description: Policies reviewed in this document. Each item maps to: wf_property_lossrun_policy (upsert on policyNumber + effectiveDate) and wf_property_lossrun_property_policy (junction).

policyNumber.description: Carrier policy number. Maps to: wf_property_lossrun_policy.policy_number. Used as part of upsert key with effectiveDate.

carrier.description: Underwriting carrier. Maps to: wf_property_lossrun_carrier (upsert on name). Natural key: name.

name.description: Full carrier name (e.g., 'General Star Indemnity Company', 'State Farm'). Maps to: wf_property_lossrun_carrier.name.

naicCode.description: NAIC carrier code if present. Maps to: wf_property_lossrun_carrier.naic_code.

coverageLine.description: Line of business. Used as natural key to resolve wf_property_lossrun_coverage_type. Maps to: wf_property_lossrun_coverage_type.label.

policyLimit.description: Total policy limit at time of the loss run. Maps to: wf_property_lossrun_policy.total_limit.

deductibleType.description: Deductible structure (e.g., 'Per Occurrence', 'Per CAT Event'). Maps to: wf_property_lossrun_policy.deductible_type.

claims.description: Claims reported under this policy. Each item maps to: wf_property_lossrun_claim.

claimNumber.description: Carrier or TPA claim reference (e.g., 'NYC21808950', '040060-004473-GD-01'). Maps to: wf_property_lossrun_claim.claim_number.

lossDate.description: Date of loss (DOL). Maps to: wf_property_lossrun_claim.date_of_loss.

causeOfLoss.description: Primary peril or cause (e.g., 'Freeze', 'Fire', 'Wind', 'Hurricane/Tropical Storm'). Maps to: wf_property_lossrun_claim.cause_of_loss.

catCode.description: Catastrophe code or event identifier if present (e.g., 'CAT 2115', 'CAT2050'). Appended to causeOfLoss or stored in wf_property_lossrun_claim.cause_of_loss.

description.description: Narrative description of the loss event. Maps to: wf_property_lossrun_claim.loss_description.

status.description: Current claim status. Maps to: wf_property_lossrun_claim.status.

claimantName.description: Claimant name for liability claims. Maps to: wf_property_lossrun_claim.notes (prefixed 'Claimant: ...').

financials.description: All financial figures reported for this claim.

paidLoss.description: Indemnity paid to date. Maps to: wf_property_lossrun_claim.total_paid.

paidLAE.description: Loss adjustment expenses paid to date. Maps to: wf_property_lossrun_claim.lae_paid.

reserveLAE.description: Outstanding LAE reserve. Maps to: wf_property_lossrun_claim.lae_reserve.

totalIncurred.description: Total incurred (paid + reserves). Maps to: wf_property_lossrun_claim.total_incurred.

grossAdvance.description: Gross advance before deductible (used in Proof of Loss documents). Maps to: wf_property_lossrun_claim.total_incurred when totalIncurred is absent.

deductibleApplied.description: Deductible amount applied to this specific claim. Maps to: wf_property_lossrun_claim.deductible_applied.

netAdvance.description: Net advance after deductible. Maps to: wf_property_lossrun_claim.amount_less_deductible.

carrierShare.description: Carrier's proportional share (e.g., '50% General Star share = $125,000'). Maps to: wf_property_lossrun_claim.total_paid when paidLoss is absent.

tpaNotes.description: Adjuster or TPA commentary and investigation notes. Maps to: wf_property_lossrun_claim.notes.

noLossAttestation.description: Populated when the document confirms no losses occurred. Absence of claims in policies[] is not sufficient — this section captures an explicit written attestation. Signals to the persistence service to insert a wf_property_lossrun_report row with no child claim rows.

confirmedNoLosses.description: True if the document explicitly attests no losses. Maps to: wf_property_lossrun_report (presence of this section, no claims inserted).

asOfDate.description: Date the confirmation was issued. Maps to: wf_property_lossrun_report.valuation_date if not already set.

statementSource.description: Who issued the no-loss confirmation (person name, org). Maps to: wf_property_lossrun_broker.contact_name if more specific than broker.contactName.

_metadata.description: Extraction pipeline metadata. Not persisted to domain tables — used for audit, re-processing, and confidence tracking.

sourceFile.description: Original filename of the source document (e.g., 'Grapevine_TwentyFour_99_-_Marsh_2023_2024.pdf'). Maps to: wf_property_lossrun_report.source_file.

fileId.description: Internal file identifier from the document management system.

extractionDate.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the LLM extraction was performed.

extractionVersion.description: Version of the extraction prompt or pipeline used.

confidence.description: LLM self-assessed confidence in the extraction quality overall.

parsingNotes.description: Any ambiguities, assumptions, or data quality issues the LLM encountered while parsing the document.
